detail.text_preview: Apr-May 14-5 14.04. - 05.05. Color Comedy Open Mic: Zürich’s Funniest Stand-Up Credits: cc Tickets Tue, 14. April 2026 - Tue, 5. May 2026 Start: 20:00 Mama Shelter, Zürich (CH) Come enjoy live stand-up comedy at Color Comedy Open Mic in Zürich! Local and visiting comedians bring laughs, fun, and chaos every Tuesday. Join us for a night of funny stories, jokes, and open mic performances . Hosted by Ruben Garcia (@rubengarciacomedy) and Joana pido(@joana_pido), the show runs every Tuesday night at Mama Shelter Zurich in Oerlikon. Each week features six comedians testing their newest material, followed by a professional headliner who closes the night strong Color Comedy is more than a show. It’s the community at the center of Zürich’s stand-up scene, where comedians and audiences come together every week to create something lively, supportive and genuinely fun. Your Tuesday just found its spark. detail.text_preview: to the overview of Pulp Non-Fiction Storytelling Open Mic Zurich May 10 Sunday Pulp Non-Fiction Storytelling Open Mic Zurich Credits: Albert Louw Buy tickets Sun, 10. May 2026 Doors open at: 18:30 19:00 - 21:00 ROBIN's Coffee, Zürich (CH) share Share now Storytelling is an art from that has evolved with us over millennia. It is in our DNA to share stories. Let's keep this ancient tradition alive in the funkiest way. Join us for an unforgettable evening where laughter intertwines with the strange and the surreal, as comedian Albert Louw and his extraordinary friends share their most captivating tales! Gather with us at the ROBIN'S Bar & Coffee. Admission is free, and while donations are appreciated, what's most important is your presence! Reserve your spot now to ensure you don't miss out on a seat. The show will be hosted by local comedian and everyday storyteller Albert Louw and feature some of Switzerland’s wide variety of storytellers, each telling true stories from all different kinds of backgrounds. detail.text_preview: Apr-Jun 14-9 14.04. - 09.06. Funny Women Zurich - Comedy Open Mic Credits: Roxy Tickets Tue, 14. April 2026 - Tue, 9. June 2026 Start: 19:30 Gleis, Zürich (CH) 🎉 Get ready for a night of belly laughs and good vibes at Funny Women Zurich at GLEIS! 🎉 🕢 Doors open at 19:30 | Show starts at 20:00 🕗 What’s in store for you? A hilarious comedy show (in English, of course!) A fabulous female-led lineup An Open Mic—because YOU could be our next star! What better way to start your week than with a hearty dose of fun and supporting an awesome cause at the same time? (I know, right?!) Feeling bold after a drink or two? Step up on stage and show us what you've got (no pressure, though—only love!) Still on the fence? Well, how about this: The event is donation-based ! (Come on, you can’t say no now, can you?!) 🎟 Remember, QR codes are required for entry, even though the event is donation-based. Don’t miss out! 🎟 Event sold out? We also have some space for walk-ins! So come by anyways! Or get your ticket for a different date: Funny Women Shows See you soon at GLEIS! 🎤✨ P.S. Did you know? Funny Women was founded by Lynne Parker in 2002 in the UK, and they’ve been leading the charge in promoting female comedy talent ever since. Check them out at funnywomen.com! detail.text_preview: Apr 16 16.04. - 30.07. IN YOUR FACE - English Stand-Up Comedy Open Mic in Zurich Credits: IN YOUR FACE comedy Tickets Thu, 16. April 2026 - Thu, 30. July 2026 Start: 19:30 ROBIN's Coffee, Zürich (CH) EVERY THURSDAY at ROBIN's Coffee : Join us for Comedy Brew ! Featuring a mix of 10 comedians, from budding talents to seasoned pros experimenting with fresh material. It's the perfect way to end your Thursday on a high note. Fancy giving comedy a go yourself? Check out how to get involved and light up the stage! Find out about comedy IN YOUR FACE shows at https://inyourfacecomedy.ch or follow us in all the places at https://inyourfacecomedy.ch/follow/ Frequently Asked Questions Is the show really in English? Absolutely. Every set is performed in English by a mix of Swiss-based and international comics, so no Swiss-German skills required. What’s a “Comedy Open Mic”? It’s the testing ground for jokes. Pros road-test fresh material and brave newcomers grab their first five minutes. Expect some gems, some flops—and the fun of seeing comedy born in real time. Will it be funny? Most of the time, yes! An open mic is a roller-coaster: seasoned acts, new voices, and the occasional glorious train-wreck. It’s all part of the charm. Can I perform too? Yes - you need to book a spot - find out more about how to do it here: https://inyourfacecomedy.ch/perform/ . Do I need to buy tickets in advance? Please ... show more EVERY THURSDAY at ROBIN's Coffee : Join us for Comedy Brew ! Featuring a mix of 10 comedians, from budding talents to seasoned pros experimenting with fresh material. It's the perfect way to end your Thursday on a high note. Fancy giving comedy a go yourself? Check out how to get involved and light up the stage! Find out about comedy IN YOUR FACE shows at https://inyourfacecomedy.ch or follow us in all the places at https://inyourfacecomedy.ch/follow/ Frequently Asked Questions Is the show really in English? Absolutely. Every set is performed in English by a mix of Swiss-based and international comics, so no Swiss-German skills required. What’s a “Comedy Open Mic”? It’s the testing ground for jokes. Pros road-test fresh material and brave newcomers grab their first five minutes. Expect some gems, some flops—and the fun of seeing comedy born in real time. Will it be funny? Most of the time, yes! An open mic is a roller-coaster: seasoned acts, new voices, and the occasional glorious train-wreck. It’s all part of the charm. Can I perform too? Yes - you need to book a spot - find out more about how to do it here: https://inyourfacecomedy.ch/perform/ . Do I need to buy tickets in advance? Please do. We’re usually running around before the show and door sales slow things down. If you’re stuck, we’ll try, but no promises. How does seating work? First come, first served—so grab a drink, snag a seat, and settle in. Is food available at the bar? ROBIN’s serves drinks only. For a pre-show bite, try Restaurant Johanniter (classic Swiss) or Holy Cow! across the street for burgers. Will the comedians pick on me? We chat with the crowd for laughs, not humiliation. Friendly banter only - you’re safe. How long is the show? Doors open 7:30pm, show starts ~7:50pm with a 15 min break in the middle ending around 10pm. Enough time for the last trams home ;) Age limit? All ages welcome of course 16+ recommended (adult themes, spicy language). Legal Disclaimer Please be aware that comedians may record their performances during the show, and audience members may also appear in these recordings. By purchasing a ticket and attending the event, you consent to being filmed or photographed in this public setting. If any content featuring you is later published online and you are uncomfortable with it, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us. We’re happy to review the material and will gladly remove it upon request. Thank you for your understanding and support! show less Weekday, Date, Time Thursday, 16.04.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 23.04.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 30.04.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 07.05.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 14.05.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 21.05.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 28.05.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 04.06.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 11.06.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 18.06.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 25.06.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 02.07.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 09.07.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 16.07.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 23.07.2026, 19:30 Tickets Thursday, 30.07.2026, 19:30 Tickets Ticket status: Few tickets available No tickets available Sales start later

detail.text_preview: to the overview of CK Presents: Richard Cunha - Immigrant Friend Nov 6 Friday CK Presents: Richard Cunha - Immigrant Friend Credits: Richard Cunha Buy tickets Fri, 6. November 2026 Doors open at: 19:00 20:00 - 22:00 ComedyHaus, Zürich (CH) share Share now Just 3 years ago Richard Cunha was doing his first open mic with Comedy Kiss, now we proudly present his first solo show ever! The first dates sold out within a week, so here we are with a further date for you. Here's what he has to say about this show: "This show is about figuring out how to make real connections, regardless of how good your passport is. Around 3 years ago, I quit my job to follow my dream of making people laugh. Swiss immigration didn’t like that, but my Swiss friends did! With the support of wonderful immigrant-loving people, I finally made it. This is my first solo , and it is an homage to kindness, frienship and my permit B. There will be plenty of jokes and real, yet unbelievable, stories. See you there, friend." ----- FAQ and More Info: Q: What time should I arrive? A: Doors open at 19:00. Arrive early to grab a drink and secure the best seats. Q: What language is the show? A: The show is in English. Q: What kind of comedy will I see? Will it be offensive? A: We can't guarantee you won't be offended since this is very relative. In the show description, you’ll find links to help you decide if that comedian is right for you. Ultimately, our goal is to bring good times and laughter to Switzerland and not to hurt feelings. detail.text_preview: Apr-Jun 21-30 21.04. - 30.06. Jokes, Jokes, Jokes - English Stand-up comedy show Credits: Łukasz Segiet Tickets Tue, 21. April 2026 - Tue, 30. June 2026 Start: 19:30 ROBIN'S bar & coffee, Zürich (CH) A crazy-fun English stand-up night with experienced comics from Zurich and beyond. Expect loose ideas, polished bits, unexpected jokes, and laughter from places you don’t expect. Hosted by Swiss-based comedian Łukasz Segiet (@woocash.comedy) , known for off-beat, unpredictable, vibe-driven comedy and a favourite among fellow comedians for his distinctive, non-obvious approach. He invites a lineup of friends and local comics to share the stage each edition. FAQ Is the show in English? Yes. The entire show is performed in English. Is it an open mic? Yes — a curated one. Comics sign up in advance and the host builds the lineup, so you get a strong mix of new ideas and proven material. Do I need a ticket? Yes—tickets are online via Eventfrog. Door tickets aren’t guaranteed. How does seating work? Free seating. First come, first served—arrive early for the best tables. Will the comedians interact with the audience? Likely some light crowd work, but no roasting unless you clearly invite it. What kind of comedy should I expect? Stand-up comedy. A mix of tighter sets and raw new bits—expect variety, surprises, and real “in-the-making” moments. Can I sign up? Yes! Come talk to me after the show or email: comedy.with.woocash@gmail.com Age limit? 16+ recommended (adult language & themes). April 2026 Doors open at: 19:00 19:30 - 21:30 Cooper's Pub, Zürich (CH) share Share now End your weekend with laughs, drinks, and good vibes at Cooper’s Pub! Join us for an English Stand-up Comedy Night where seasoned comics test fresh material and newcomers take their very first steps on stage. Free entry. Bring friends. 🍻 FAQ Is the show in English? → Yes, all performances are in English. What’s an Open Mic? → Anyone can sign up and perform! Expect a mix of amateurs and pros trying out new material. Can I perform too? → Absolutely! Comment "SPOT" on the facebook event page or drop a line to your host Łukasz at lukas.segiet@gmail.com with "SPOT" in the subject. How do reservations work? → Tickets are available on Eventfrog. Seating is free (no assigned seats), so come early to grab a good spot. See you at Cooper’s! detail.text_preview: to the overview of Kon-Tiki Comedy Shows Apr 14 Tuesday Kon-Tiki Comedy - April 14th Credits: cx Buy tickets Tue, 14. April 2026 19:30 - 21:30 KON-TIKI, Zürich (CH) share Share now Kon-Tiki Comedy! Zurich's longest standing weekly Comedy Night : English Standup at Kon-Tiki Bar since 2018 Kon-Tiki Comedy has long become a staple of Tuesday Nights in Zurich! Veterans, regulars, amateurs & newbies from all around the world show up to make people laugh. This Comedy Open Mic is regularly Hosted by Ahmet Bilge. Kon-Tiki Comedy is the place for English Standup in central Zurich. Come join & laugh with us! Frequently Asked Questions: ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Q: Is the show in English? A: YES. Kon-Tiki Comedy is always in English. Q: What's the difference of a Comedy Open Mic from a regular Comedy Show? A: Anybody who wants can go on stage at a Comedy Open Mic. A bunch of Comedians will be there, but they will be trying out jokes, because this is how Comedians find out if something is funny or not, so you get to be there at the birthplace of jokes. Often Comedy Open Mics are more casual & but also funny as well! Q: Can I perform Comedy also? A: Yes of course! Just contact theamericanstandupshow@gmail.com if you're interested in performing. Or directly go to the event page on facebook & write "SPOT" inside the event discussion. You'll ... show more Kon-Tiki Comedy! Zurich's longest standing weekly Comedy Night : English Standup at Kon-Tiki Bar since 2018 Kon-Tiki Comedy has long become a staple of Tuesday Nights in Zurich! Veterans, regulars, amateurs & newbies from all around the world show up to make people laugh. This Comedy Open Mic is regularly Hosted by Ahmet Bilge. Kon-Tiki Comedy is the place for English Standup in central Zurich. Come join & laugh with us! Frequently Asked Questions: ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Q: Is the show in English? A: YES. Kon-Tiki Comedy is always in English. Q: What's the difference of a Comedy Open Mic from a regular Comedy Show? A: Anybody who wants can go on stage at a Comedy Open Mic. A bunch of Comedians will be there, but they will be trying out jokes, because this is how Comedians find out if something is funny or not, so you get to be there at the birthplace of jokes. Often Comedy Open Mics are more casual & but also funny as well! Q: Can I perform Comedy also? A: Yes of course! Just contact theamericanstandupshow@gmail.com if you're interested in performing. Or directly go to the event page on facebook & write "SPOT" inside the event discussion. You'll be confirmed later & will get 5minutes to start off with. Anybody can sign up! Q: What about these seats? A : First come first served rule applies! Especially since Kon-Tiki Comedy is popular, often it is packed inside, so come early for good seats. What's early? Anything before 19:00 & you will have your seat of choice. If you come after 19:30 especially you are not guaranteed a seat! Q : What about the late show? Depending on the turnout a late show is also available most of the time, please check the ticket page to see if there is a late show option. Basically if you can buy tickets to the late show, it's happening, if it's not an option for a ticket it's not! Both shows might be consolidated into one if there's not enough ticket sold for the late show. In this case you will recieve an e-mail telling you so. Q : Can I refund my ticket? There are no refunds allowed because it becomes too much work for a simple Comedy Open Mic, so only buy your ticket if you know you're for sure going to be able to make it. But if for some reason you can't make it, you are welcome to use your ticket for any future Kon-Tiki Comedy Shows. Just write an e-mail to exchange. Q : Can I buy tickets at the door? No please don't. Technically we can but it complicates everything, so just buy them online. Just to persuade you NOT to ask to buy at the door: Tickets at the door are 20.-CHF. Please buy online : ) Q: Will it be funny? A : You betcha. You can't do a regular show since 2018 & not be funny. Any other questions: Email: theamericanstandupshow@gmail.com with the title "Kon-Tiki Comedy" But if it's any of the questions covered by the FAQ above, I will still answer it, but first I will insult you. Legal Disclaimer: Comedians may film their sets as well as the audience during the comedy show. By buying a ticket you consent to being filmed in this public space. If you ever have a problem with any clip published online you are very welcome to contact us & ask to have it removed, we are happy to accomodate you. Thank you for your understanding. show less The event starts in 0 Days 8 h 25 min 09 s Event organiser Ahmet Bilge Cetinkaya Event organiser info Note Cancel Note Information buyers The selected tickets can only be purchased personalised. Basically if you can buy tickets to the late show, it's happening, if it's not an option for a ticket it's not! There are no refunds allowed because it becomes too much work for a simple Comedy Open Mic, so only buy your ticket if you know you're for sure going to be able to make it. But if for some reason you can't make it, you are welcome to use your ticket for any future Kon-Tiki Comedy Shows. Just write an e-mail to exchange. Q : Can I buy tickets at the door? No please don't. Technically we can but it complicates everything, so just buy them online. Just to persuade you NOT to ask to buy at the door: Tickets at the door are 20.-CHF. detail.text_preview: Nov 11 Wednesday Comedy Kiss Presents: Ali Siddiq Credits: Shane Norton Buy tickets Wed, 11. November 2026 Doors open at: 19:00 19:30 - 20:45 Volkshaus Zürich Weisser Saal, Zürich (CH) share Share now Ali Siddiq, one of the most compelling storytellers in stand-up today is bringing his show to Zurich Raw, gripping, and deeply human, Ali Siddiq is one of the most compelling storytellers in stand-up today. Raised in Houston and shaped by lived experience, his comedy blends honesty, resilience, and unforgettable true stories. He made history as the first comedian to release a four-part stand-up series, THE DOMINO EFFECT 1–4 , amassing over 50 million views and turning each chapter into a must-watch event. Ali’s reach extends far beyond the stage — he has been featured on The Joe Rogan Experience, Club Shay Shay, 85 South, The Breakfast Club, Kill Tony, VladTV, Your Mom’s House, Good Morning America, and dozens of other top shows and podcasts, making him one of the most recognized and requested voices in comedy today. I've been a fan after having seen him on YouTube several years ago. He's a stand out stand up comedian and much loved by comedy fans. Our Open Mic Community WhatsApp nearly exploded on the news that he is coming to Zurich, so don't miss out. April 2026 20:00 - 22:00 Caverno Bülach, Bülach (CH) share Share now Was wie eine Beleidigung klingt, ist in Milanskis Welt eher die Erfindung eines Superhelden. In seinem ersten abendfüllenden Programm geht es eben genau um diese Reise: Vom Coming Out zu Coming of Age, von Plattenbau und Arbeiterklasse zu RTL2 und Britney Spears. Seine Comedy ist lustig, ein bisschen loco und in erster Linie verdammt ehrlich. Milan nimmt uns mit auf eine Achterbahnfahrt durch sein bisheriges Leben und scheut sich nicht, auch die schrägsten und (je nach Gusto) peinlichsten Momente zu teilen. Milan Milanski ist seit Jahren in aller Munde und damit ist jetzt nicht „das“ gemeint. Sei es als Moderator des erfolgreichsten Open Mics der Schweiz oder als Außenreporter von Stefan Büssers „Late Nite Switzerland“ - der Schwugo liefert und gehört zu den jungen Wilden der hiesigen Comedyszene. Mit seinem unnachahmlichen Stil und seiner scharfen Zunge trifft er den Nerv der Generation Y und denen die da gerne dazugehören wollen. Also Karten kaufen und den inneren Schwugo heraufbeschwören! Milan Milanski Unser Restaurant ist vor der Vorstellung für euch geöffnet, geniesst ein gemütliches Essen, bevor die Show beginnt! Reservation erwünscht. events.title: Tickets Apr 30 Schrödinger's Mic: English stand-up comedy 30 April, Thursday, 20:00 CAB StuZ (ETH Building), Zürich (CH)

detail.title_tag: Schrödinger's Mic: English stand-up comedy in Zürich | Comedy & Cabaret
detail.og_title: Schrödinger's Mic: English stand-up comedy in Zürich | Comedy & Cabaret
detail.text_preview: Apr 30 Thursday Schrödinger's Mic: English stand-up comedy Credits: SaraB Buy tickets Thu, 30. April 2026 Doors open at: 19:00 20:00 - 22:00 CAB StuZ (ETH Building), Zürich (CH) share Share now Are you the one who always sends memes? The loudest laugh in the group chat? The friend who says “just one drink” and somehow stays out all night? Then this comedy show is for you. Join us for Schrödinger’s Mic , a night of English stand-up comedy brought to you by ESN Zürich and ESN Winterthur . Expect a lineup of some of the best comedians on the Swiss comedy scene, delivering sharp jokes, chaotic stories, and the kind of humour that keeps you laughing long after the show is over. Whether you come with friends, a date, your flatmates, or just by yourself, this is the perfect excuse to grab a drink, relax, and enjoy a great night out. Don’t miss out – see you there, fam! We’re also excited to welcome a lineup of standout comedians from the Swiss comedy scene. The night will be hosted by headliner Richard Cunha , with performances from Matteo Hermann , Martina Hulme , Łukasz Segiet , Val Ann , and Pouya ! A few things to know before the show: The performance will be in English Doors open at 19:00 , and the show begins at 20:00 Drinks will be available before the show and during the intermission Photos will be taken during the event for promotional purposes, and possibly for someone’s Hinge profile. For more information, you can contact the ESN representative: Matteo Hermann (mherman@student.ethz.ch) Event organiser ESN Zurich Event organiser info Note Cancel Note Information buyers The selected tickets can only be purchased personalised. detail.og_title: Comedy Kiss Showcases in Zürich | Comedy & Cabaret
detail.text_preview: Apr-Jun 24-16 24.04. - 16.06. Comedy Kiss Showcases Credits: Comedy Kiss Tickets Fri, 24. April 2026 - Tue, 16. June 2026 Start: 20:00 Auer & Co., Zürich (CH) Part of Comedy Kiss’s mission to bring Laughter to Switzerland, these shows spotlight the best local comedic talent while supporting the growth of Zurich’s comedy scene. Whether you’re laughing at life in Switzerland ( Showcase ) or diving into the hilarities of love and dating ( Kiss & Tell ), every show is a celebration of local artistry. By attending, you’re not only enjoying top-notch entertainment but also helping to improve and sustain the vibrant local art scene. Join us for an unforgettable night of comedy, connection, and community! These shows happen every second friday and are hosted by your favorite local Brazilian comic (also the only one) Richard Cunha. ----- Tell everyone about it and buy your tickets now! Doors open at 19:00. Arrive early to Auer & Co to get a drink and save the best seats. The show is in English Photos of the show may be taken for promotional purposes. Check out our future shows as www.comedykiss.ch and follow us on Instagram at @comedykiss.ch for funny videos, show updates and more. detail.og_title: The Big Comedy Kiss with Finlay Christie in Zürich | Comedy & Cabaret
detail.text_preview: Apr 18 Saturday The Big Comedy Kiss with Finlay Christie Credits: Shane Norton Buy tickets Sat, 18. April 2026 Doors open at: 18:30 19:30 - 21:30 SOHO, Zürich (CH) share Share now The Biggest Comedy Kiss keeps getting Bigger and Better! Our much-loved comedy night is back — and this time, we’re turning up the spotlight! We’ve gone all out to make this our most exciting edition yet, featuring one incredible international star alongside some of the finest local comedians in Switzerland. Finlay Christie - Finlay is young but he's been on the circuit now for what feels forever. At 19, he was the youngest ever winner of the prestigious "So You Think You’re Funny" competition, and then developed into a YouTube sensation with over 450k subscribers and 200m views. He's been a comedian that I've been keen to get over into Switzerland for ages, so it's a pleasure to finally be able to do so. He has appeared on 8 out of 10 Cats Does Countdown (Channel 4), The Stand-Up Sketch Show (ITV2), Comedy Central Live, Person on a Chair (Channel 4), The BBC New Comedy Awards, Get Off My Phone! (Dave) and Jokes Only An AI Can Tell (Channel 4). He has performed at Montreal’s Just For Laughs festival and across Europe for the Comedy Store. "Delivering a hugely impressive debut that could legitimately see him labelled as the voice of his generation" ★★★★ Chortle "Finlay Christie’s OK Zoomer is a show you need to see at the Fringe this year… will leave you ... show more The Biggest Comedy Kiss keeps getting Bigger and Better! Finlay Christie - Finlay is young but he's been on the circuit now for what feels forever. He has appeared on 8 out of 10 Cats Does Countdown (Channel 4), The Stand-Up Sketch Show (ITV2), Comedy Central Live, Person on a Chair (Channel 4), The BBC New Comedy Awards, Get Off My Phone! (Dave) and Jokes Only An AI Can Tell (Channel 4). He has performed at Montreal’s Just For Laughs festival and across Europe for the Comedy Store. "Delivering a hugely impressive debut that could legitimately see him labelled as the voice of his generation" ★★★★ Chortle "Finlay Christie’s OK Zoomer is a show you need to see at the Fringe this year… will leave you in stitches" ★★★★ Entertainment Now "Outstanding… he will be taking the comedy world by storm, catch him now while you can" ★★★★ One4Review "Finlay Christie will be the future of stand-up comedy" ★★★★ Broadway Baby ----- Teddy Hall - Since learning his trade as a comedian in London, Teddy has been performing across Europe for half a decade, exciting audiences with an unpredictable and quick-witted brand of comedy all about language, mental health, sexuality, and dentists. Headlining shows across Europe and featuring on television in Switzerland, Germany, Austria, and Romania, Teddy's comedy veers from the profound to the inane to the stupid, keeping audiences on their toes, despite this being a very uncomfortable way to sit. ----- Łukasz Segiet - There are many planets in the universe and Łukasz lives on one of them. He likes jokes, comedy, space, travel, and jokes. Łukasz knows how microphones work and how to use a mic stand. Which is a useful skill in the business of comedy. His offbeat and unique style will certainly make you laugh. I know this because I can't keep a smile off my face when he's on stage. Spread the word and check out our future shows at www.comedykiss.ch and follow us on Instagram at @comedykiss.ch. ----- FAQ and More Info: Q: What time should I arrive? A: Doors open at 18:30. Arrive early to grab a drink, order some food, and secure the best seats. Email info@soho-zurich.ch to reserve your table. Q: What language is the show? A: The show is in English. Q: What kind of comedy will I see? Will it be offensive? A: We can't guarantee you won't be offended since this is very relative. In the show description, you’ll find links to help you decide if that comedian is right for you. Ultimately, our goal is to bring good times and laughter to Switzerland and not to hurt feelings. Q: Can I buy tickets at the door? A: Yes! detail.og_title: The Big Comedy Kiss with Anuvab Pal in Zürich | Comedy & Cabaret
detail.text_preview: Oct 10 Saturday The Big Comedy Kiss with Anuvab Pal Credits: Shane Norton Buy tickets Sat, 10. October 2026 Doors open at: 18:30 19:30 - 21:30 SOHO, Zürich (CH) share Share now Our much-loved comedy night is back — and this time, we’re turning up the spotlight! We’ve gone all out to make this our most exciting edition yet, featuring one incredible international star alongside some of the finest local comedians in Switzerland. Anuvab Pal – Described by The New York Times as “India’s most intelligent comedian” and by the BBC as “India’s answer to British wit,” Anuvab Pal is one of the most globally recognised English-speaking comics to come out of India. His stand-up special The Nation Wants To Know has played over 500 sold-out shows from Mumbai to Sydney to San Francisco, while his hit show Empire — a comedy about the history of the British Empire in India — has toured internationally across 12 cities and is now available as a special on Amazon Prime UK as part of Soho Theatre Live. Beyond stand-up, Anuvab is a prolific writer and creator. He has written Bollywood films Loins of Punjab Presents and The President Is Coming , the latter developed by London’s Royal Court Theatre . His play Chaos Theory became a bestselling novel, and he has created multiple sitcoms for Amazon Prime Video India. His work has been featured internationally in Time Magazine, CNN, BBC, The Wall Street Journal, The Economist, Financial Times and The New Yorker , among many ... show more Our much-loved comedy night is back — and this time, we’re turning up the spotlight! We’ve gone all out to make this our most exciting edition yet, featuring one incredible international star alongside some of the finest local comedians in Switzerland. Anuvab Pal – Described by The New York Times as “India’s most intelligent comedian” and by the BBC as “India’s answer to British wit,” Anuvab Pal is one of the most globally recognised English-speaking comics to come out of India. His stand-up special The Nation Wants To Know has played over 500 sold-out shows from Mumbai to Sydney to San Francisco, while his hit show Empire — a comedy about the history of the British Empire in India — has toured internationally across 12 cities and is now available as a special on Amazon Prime UK as part of Soho Theatre Live. Beyond stand-up, Anuvab is a prolific writer and creator. He has written Bollywood films Loins of Punjab Presents and The President Is Coming , the latter developed by London’s Royal Court Theatre . His play Chaos Theory became a bestselling novel, and he has created multiple sitcoms for Amazon Prime Video India. His work has been featured internationally in Time Magazine, CNN, BBC, The Wall Street Journal, The Economist, Financial Times and The New Yorker , among many others. On screen and radio, his credits include QI (BBC2), Big Asian Stand-Up (BBC2), The News Quiz (BBC Radio 4), The New Year’s Eve International Show (BBC World Service) and Al Murray: Why Does Everyone Hate The British Empire (Sky History). He is also a regular contributor to the global satirical podcast The Bugle and writes a monthly column for The Economic Times . “India’s most intelligent comedian” — The New York Times “India’s answer to British wit” — BBC “Spectacular” ★★★★ — India Today “Brilliant” ★★★★ — Time Out Mumbai “One of India’s funniest people” — CNN “Very clever, very funny” — The Guardian ----- Chris Darwa is one of our local heavyweights. He's keen and commited to making you all laugh in English, and he's good at doing it. His current tour is selling well after his previous successful european tours in 2024 and 2023. Known for punch heavy anecdotes, high energy, playful crowd work and brutal honesty, Chris's shows are always a unique experience and not to be missed! ----- Bianca Lala - Bianca Lala, a Prague-based stand-up comedian, producer, and writer, transforms life’s absurdities into painfully relatable jokes. A semi-finalist in Prague’s Funniest competition 2025 and featured on Red Mic, she produces weekly stand-up shows tackling everything from dating and sex to dark humor rooted in life’s tragedies. Having performed in various sketchy venues across Europe—and surviving—Bianca recently appeared on national television in her native Romania (the sketchiest of all). As the co-founder of Unhinged Theatre, she also works behind the scenes, writing scripts and crafting chaotic yet entertaining plotlines. Spread the word and check out our future shows at www.comedykiss.ch and follow us on Instagram at @comedykiss.ch. ----- FAQ and More Info: Q: What time should I arrive? A: Doors open at 18:30. As the co-founder of Unhinged Theatre, she also works behind the scenes, writing scripts and crafting chaotic yet entertaining plotlines. Spread the word and check out our future shows at www.comedykiss.ch and follow us on Instagram at @comedykiss.ch. ----- FAQ and More Info: Q: What time should I arrive?     A: Doors open at 18:30. Arrive early to grab a drink, order some food, and secure the best seats. Q: What language is the show?     A: The show is in English. Q: What kind of comedy will I see? Will it be offensive?     A: We can't guarantee you won't be offended since this is very relative. In the show description, you'll find links to help you decide if that comedian is right for you. Ultimately, our goal is to bring good times and laughter to Switzerland and not to hurt feelings. Q: Can I buy tickets at the door?     A: Yes! Via Twint, but only if there are no shows or tickets are still available  Note: Photos of the show will be taken for promotional purposes.

June 2026 Start: 19:30 ROBIN's Coffee, Zürich (CH) NOW EVERY SECOND TUESDAY at ROBIN's Coffee : It's DOWN UNDER COMEDY ! Chris Darwa brings his brand of unstoppable Australian comedy to the stage, along with a mix of hilarious friends from the Swiss Comedy scene, some experimenting with new material, others honing their act, either way, your Tuesday is sure to end pissing yourself with laughs. Doors - 19:15 / Show Start - 19:30 Get there early to enjoy! Venue open till 24:00 Find out about Chris Darwa on instagram @chrisdarwa Frequently Asked Questions Is the show really in English? Absolutely. Every set is performed in English by a mix of Swiss-based and international comics, so no Swiss-German skills required. Will it be funny? Most of the time, yes! A show like this is a roller-coaster: seasoned acts, new voices, and the occasional glorious train-wreck. It’s all part of the charm. Can I perform too? If you're really looking to try - find out more about how to do it here: https://inyourfacecomedy.ch/perform/ . Do I need to buy tickets in advance? Please do. We’re usually running around before the show and door sales slow things down. If you’re stuck, we’ll try, but no promises. How does seating work? Chris Darwa brings his brand of unstoppable Australian comedy to the stage, along with a mix of hilarious friends from the Swiss Comedy scene, some experimenting with new material, others honing their act, either way, your Tuesday is sure to end pissing yourself with laughs. Absolutely. Every set is performed in English by a mix of Swiss-based and international comics, so no Swiss-German skills required. Will it be funny? Most of the time, yes! A show like this is a roller-coaster: seasoned acts, new voices, and the occasional glorious train-wreck. It’s all part of the charm. Can I perform too? If you're really looking to try - find out more about how to do it here: https://inyourfacecomedy.ch/perform/ . Do I need to buy tickets in advance? Please do. We’re usually running around before the show and door sales slow things down. If you’re stuck, we’ll try, but no promises. How does seating work? First come, first served—so grab a drink, snag a seat, and settle in. Is food available at the bar? ROBIN’s serves drinks only. For a pre-show bite, try Restaurant Johanniter (classic Swiss) or Holy Cow! across the street for burgers. Will the comedians pick on me? We chat with the crowd for laughs, not humiliation. Friendly banter only - you’re safe. How long is the show? Doors open 7:15pm, show starts ~7:30pm with a 15 min break in the middle ending around 9:15pm. Enough time for the last trams home ;) Age limit? All ages welcome of course 16+ recommended (adult themes, spicy language). Legal Disclaimer Please be aware that comedians may record their performances during the show, and audience members may also appear in these recordings. By purchasing a ticket and attending the event, you consent to being filmed or photographed in this public setting. If any content featuring you is later published online and you are uncomfortable with it, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us. We’re happy to review the material and will gladly remove it upon request. April 2026 Türöffnung: 19:00 Uhr 19:30 Uhr - 22:00 Uhr jenseits IM VIADUKT, Zürich (CH) teilen Jetzt teilen CROSSING THE RUBICON Have you ever made a choice that changed everything? A moment where the door slammed shut behind you, and the only way out was going through? On Thursday, April 30th, we are gathering for a ZST mainstage evening of true stories about those life-altering leaps, irreversible decisions, and the glorious (or disastrous;-) aftermath of saying "why not!" "Ships are safe in harbor, but that’s not what ships are built for." — John A. Shedd ARE YOU ALL IN? We’ve all stood on that edge. Maybe it was the moment you finally hit "un-subscribe" from an unfulfilling job, the night you committed to a FWB "situationship," or that impulsive decision to move outside the city where there's only one bus per hour. Once you roll the dice, there’s no turning back. Whether you ended up exactly where you needed to be or found yourself in a completely unexpected reality, we want to hear your truth. MOMENTS OF NO RETURN: The Leap of Faith: That career pivot or international move that felt like jumping without a parachute. The Bridge Burned: When you finally stood your ground, spoke your truth, and knew things would never be the same. The Point of Impact: A split-second decision—heroic, hilarious, or heartbreaking—that changed forever who you are today. detail.text_preview: Apr 16 16.04. - 30.07. IN YOUR FACE - English Stand-Up Comedy Open Mic in Zurich Credits: IN YOUR FACE comedy Tickets Do., 16. April 2026 - Do., 30. Juli 2026 Beginn: 19:30 Uhr ROBIN's Coffee, Zürich (CH) EVERY THURSDAY at ROBIN's Coffee : Join us for Comedy Brew ! Featuring a mix of 10 comedians, from budding talents to seasoned pros experimenting with fresh material. It's the perfect way to end your Thursday on a high note. Fancy giving comedy a go yourself? Check out how to get involved and light up the stage! Find out about comedy IN YOUR FACE shows at https://inyourfacecomedy.ch or follow us in all the places at https://inyourfacecomedy.ch/follow/ Frequently Asked Questions Is the show really in English? Absolutely. Every set is performed in English by a mix of Swiss-based and international comics, so no Swiss-German skills required. What’s a “Comedy Open Mic”? It’s the testing ground for jokes. Pros road-test fresh material and brave newcomers grab their first five minutes. Expect some gems, some flops—and the fun of seeing comedy born in real time. Will it be funny? Most of the time, yes! An open mic is a roller-coaster: seasoned acts, new voices, and the occasional glorious train-wreck. It’s all part of the charm. Can I perform too? Yes - you need to book a spot - find out more about how to do it here: https://inyourfacecomedy.ch/perform/ . Do I need to buy tickets in advance? Please ... mehr anzeigen EVERY THURSDAY at ROBIN's Coffee : Join us for Comedy Brew ! Featuring a mix of 10 comedians, from budding talents to seasoned pros experimenting with fresh material. It's the perfect way to end your Thursday on a high note. Fancy giving comedy a go yourself? Check out how to get involved and light up the stage! Find out about comedy IN YOUR FACE shows at https://inyourfacecomedy.ch or follow us in all the places at https://inyourfacecomedy.ch/follow/ Frequently Asked Questions Is the show really in English? Absolutely. Every set is performed in English by a mix of Swiss-based and international comics, so no Swiss-German skills required. What’s a “Comedy Open Mic”? It’s the testing ground for jokes. Pros road-test fresh material and brave newcomers grab their first five minutes. Expect some gems, some flops—and the fun of seeing comedy born in real time. Will it be funny? Most of the time, yes! An open mic is a roller-coaster: seasoned acts, new voices, and the occasional glorious train-wreck. It’s all part of the charm. Can I perform too? Yes - you need to book a spot - find out more about how to do it here: https://inyourfacecomedy.ch/perform/ . Do I need to buy tickets in advance? Please do. We’re usually running around before the show and door sales slow things down. If you’re stuck, we’ll try, but no promises. How does seating work? First come, first served—so grab a drink, snag a seat, and settle in. Is food available at the bar? ROBIN’s serves drinks only. For a pre-show bite, try Restaurant Johanniter (classic Swiss) or Holy Cow! across the street for burgers. Will the comedians pick on me? We chat with the crowd for laughs, not humiliation. Friendly banter only - you’re safe. How long is the show? Doors open 7:30pm, show starts ~7:50pm with a 15 min break in the middle ending around 10pm. Enough time for the last trams home ;) Age limit? All ages welcome of course 16+ recommended (adult themes, spicy language). Legal Disclaimer Please be aware that comedians may record their performances during the show, and audience members may also appear in these recordings. By purchasing a ticket and attending the event, you consent to being filmed or photographed in this public setting. If any content featuring you is later published online and you are uncomfortable with it, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us. We’re happy to review the material and will gladly remove it upon request. Thank you for your understanding and support! weniger anzeigen Wochentag, Datum, Zeit Donnerstag, 16.04.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 23.04.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 30.04.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 07.05.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 14.05.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 21.05.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 28.05.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 04.06.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 11.06.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 18.06.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 25.06.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 02.07.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 09.07.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 16.07.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 23.07.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Donnerstag, 30.07.2026, 19:30 Uhr Tickets Ticket-Status: Wenige Tickets verfügbar Keine Tickets verfügbar Verkaufsstart später

detail.text_preview: Apr 16-30 16.04. - 30.04. AMBOSS JAM Credits: Nicole Rötheli für Amboss Rampe Events ansehen Do., 16. April 2026 - Do., 30. April 2026 Beginn: 21:00 Uhr Amboss Rampe, Zürich (CH) Jam Session Kurzbeschrieb: Musik verbindet bekanntermassen, das zeigen die Donnerstage in der Amboss Rampe. An der wöchentlichen Jam Session dreht sich alles um das gemeinsame Musizieren. Alle, die Musik lieben sind willkommen! Beschrieb: Die Seiten sind gespannt, die Stimme geölt und das Bier kalt – Die Jam Session kann kommen! Für alle die noch nie an einer Jam-Session bei uns waren: Der Name ist Programm, nach einem 30-minütigen Intro der House-Band wird die Bühne freigegeben und es heisst: Open Mic! Rechts von der Bühne gibt es eine Warteschlange-Liste, in der man sich einschreiben kann und, danach heisst es warten, bis man an der Reihe ist und aufgerufen wird. Es ist völlig egal ob Gesang, Schlagzeug, Gitarre oder Triangel, solange die Freude am gemeinsamen Musizieren da ist, sind alle willkommen! Ab sofort gehen die Jam-Nächte ganz offiziell bis um 02.00 Uhr! detail.og_title: CK Presents: Richard Cunha - Immigrant Friend in Zürich | Comedy & Kabarett
detail.text_preview: zur Übersicht von CK Presents: Richard Cunha - Immigrant Friend Nov 6 Freitag CK Presents: Richard Cunha - Immigrant Friend Credits: Richard Cunha Tickets kaufen Fr., 6. November 2026 Türöffnung: 19:00 Uhr 20:00 Uhr - 22:00 Uhr ComedyHaus, Zürich (CH) teilen Jetzt teilen Just 3 years ago Richard Cunha was doing his first open mic with Comedy Kiss, now we proudly present his first solo show ever! The first dates sold out within a week, so here we are with a further date for you. Here's what he has to say about this show: "This show is about figuring out how to make real connections, regardless of how good your passport is. Around 3 years ago, I quit my job to follow my dream of making people laugh. Swiss immigration didn’t like that, but my Swiss friends did! With the support of wonderful immigrant-loving people, I finally made it. This is my first solo , and it is an homage to kindness, frienship and my permit B. There will be plenty of jokes and real, yet unbelievable, stories. See you there, friend." ----- FAQ and More Info: Q: What time should I arrive? A: Doors open at 19:00. Arrive early to grab a drink and secure the best seats. Q: What language is the show? A: The show is in English. Q: What kind of comedy will I see? Will it be offensive? A: We can't guarantee you won't be offended since this is very relative. In the show description, you’ll find links to help you decide if that comedian is right for you. Ultimately, our goal is to bring good times and laughter to Switzerland and not to hurt feelings. detail.text_preview: Apr-Jun 21-30 21.04. - 30.06. Jokes, Jokes, Jokes - English Stand-up comedy show Credits: Łukasz Segiet Tickets Di., 21. April 2026 - Di., 30. Juni 2026 Beginn: 19:30 Uhr ROBIN'S bar & coffee, Zürich (CH) A crazy-fun English stand-up night with experienced comics from Zurich and beyond. Expect loose ideas, polished bits, unexpected jokes, and laughter from places you don’t expect. Hosted by Swiss-based comedian Łukasz Segiet (@woocash.comedy) , known for off-beat, unpredictable, vibe-driven comedy and a favourite among fellow comedians for his distinctive, non-obvious approach. He invites a lineup of friends and local comics to share the stage each edition. FAQ Is the show in English? Yes. The entire show is performed in English. Is it an open mic? Yes — a curated one. Comics sign up in advance and the host builds the lineup, so you get a strong mix of new ideas and proven material. Do I need a ticket? Yes—tickets are online via Eventfrog. Door tickets aren’t guaranteed. How does seating work? Free seating. First come, first served—arrive early for the best tables. Will the comedians interact with the audience? Likely some light crowd work, but no roasting unless you clearly invite it. What kind of comedy should I expect? Stand-up comedy. A mix of tighter sets and raw new bits—expect variety, surprises, and real “in-the-making” moments. Can I sign up? Yes! detail.text_preview: zur Übersicht von Kon-Tiki Comedy Shows Apr 14 Dienstag Kon-Tiki Comedy - April 14th Credits: cx Tickets kaufen Di., 14. April 2026 19:30 Uhr - 21:30 Uhr KON-TIKI, Zürich (CH) teilen Jetzt teilen Kon-Tiki Comedy! Zurich's longest standing weekly Comedy Night : English Standup at Kon-Tiki Bar since 2018 Kon-Tiki Comedy has long become a staple of Tuesday Nights in Zurich! Veterans, regulars, amateurs & newbies from all around the world show up to make people laugh. This Comedy Open Mic is regularly Hosted by Ahmet Bilge. Kon-Tiki Comedy is the place for English Standup in central Zurich. Come join & laugh with us! Frequently Asked Questions: ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Q: Is the show in English? A: YES. Kon-Tiki Comedy is always in English. Q: What's the difference of a Comedy Open Mic from a regular Comedy Show? A: Anybody who wants can go on stage at a Comedy Open Mic. A bunch of Comedians will be there, but they will be trying out jokes, because this is how Comedians find out if something is funny or not, so you get to be there at the birthplace of jokes. Often Comedy Open Mics are more casual & but also funny as well! Q: Can I perform Comedy also? A: Yes of course! Just contact theamericanstandupshow@gmail.com if you're interested in performing. Or directly go to the event page on facebook & write "SPOT" inside the event discussion. You'll ... mehr anzeigen Kon-Tiki Comedy! Zurich's longest standing weekly Comedy Night : English Standup at Kon-Tiki Bar since 2018 Kon-Tiki Comedy has long become a staple of Tuesday Nights in Zurich! Veterans, regulars, amateurs & newbies from all around the world show up to make people laugh. This Comedy Open Mic is regularly Hosted by Ahmet Bilge. Kon-Tiki Comedy is the place for English Standup in central Zurich. Come join & laugh with us! Frequently Asked Questions: ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Q: Is the show in English? A: YES. Kon-Tiki Comedy is always in English. Q: What's the difference of a Comedy Open Mic from a regular Comedy Show? A: Anybody who wants can go on stage at a Comedy Open Mic. A bunch of Comedians will be there, but they will be trying out jokes, because this is how Comedians find out if something is funny or not, so you get to be there at the birthplace of jokes. Often Comedy Open Mics are more casual & but also funny as well! Q: Can I perform Comedy also? A: Yes of course! Just contact theamericanstandupshow@gmail.com if you're interested in performing. Or directly go to the event page on facebook & write "SPOT" inside the event discussion. You'll be confirmed later & will get 5minutes to start off with. Anybody can sign up! Q: What about these seats? A : First come first served rule applies! Especially since Kon-Tiki Comedy is popular, often it is packed inside, so come early for good seats. What's early? Anything before 19:00 & you will have your seat of choice. If you come after 19:30 especially you are not guaranteed a seat! Q : What about the late show? Depending on the turnout a late show is also available most of the time, please check the ticket page to see if there is a late show option. Basically if you can buy tickets to the late show, it's happening, if it's not an option for a ticket it's not! Both shows might be consolidated into one if there's not enough ticket sold for the late show. In this case you will recieve an e-mail telling you so. Q : Can I refund my ticket? There are no refunds allowed because it becomes too much work for a simple Comedy Open Mic, so only buy your ticket if you know you're for sure going to be able to make it. But if for some reason you can't make it, you are welcome to use your ticket for any future Kon-Tiki Comedy Shows. Just write an e-mail to exchange. Q : Can I buy tickets at the door? No please don't. Technically we can but it complicates everything, so just buy them online. Just to persuade you NOT to ask to buy at the door: Tickets at the door are 20.-CHF. Please buy online : ) Q: Will it be funny? A : You betcha. You can't do a regular show since 2018 & not be funny. Any other questions: Email: theamericanstandupshow@gmail.com with the title "Kon-Tiki Comedy" But if it's any of the questions covered by the FAQ above, I will still answer it, but first I will insult you. Legal Disclaimer: Comedians may film their sets as well as the audience during the comedy show. By buying a ticket you consent to being filmed in this public space. If you ever have a problem with any clip published online you are very welcome to contact us & ask to have it removed, we are happy to accomodate you. Thank you for your understanding. weniger anzeigen Der Event beginnt in 0 Tage 8 Std 23 Min 09 Sek Veranstalter:in Ahmet Bilge Cetinkaya Infos zur Veranstalter:in Hinweis Abbrechen Hinweis Informationen Käufer:innen Die ausgewählten Tickets können nur personalisiert gekauft werden. ld_json.name: Kon-Tiki Comedy -  April 21st
ld_json.description: Kon-Tiki Comedy! Zurich's longest standing weekly Comedy Night : English Standup at Kon-Tiki Bar since 2018 Kon-Tiki Comedy has long become a staple of Tuesday Nights in Zurich! Veterans, regulars, amateurs & newbies from all around the world show up to make people laugh. This Comedy Open Mic is regularly Hosted by Ahmet Bilge. Kon-Tiki Comedy is the place for English Standup in central Zurich. Come join & laugh with us! Frequently Asked Questions: ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Q: Is the show in English? A: YES. Kon-Tiki Comedy is always in English. Q: What's the difference of a Comedy Open Mic from a regular Comedy Show? A: Anybody who wants can go on stage at a Comedy Open Mic. A bunch of Comedians will be there, but they will be trying out jokes, because this is how Comedians find out if something is funny or not, so you get to be there at the birthplace of jokes. Often Comedy Open Mics are more casual & but also funny as well!        Q: Can I perform Comedy also?     A: Yes of course! Just contact theamericanstandupshow@gmail.com if you're interested in performing. Or directly go to the event page on facebook & write SPOT inside the event discussion. You'll be confirmed later & will get 5minutes to start off with. Anybody can sign up!        Q: What about these seats? A : First come first served rule applies! Especially since Kon-Tiki Comedy is popular, often it is packed inside, so come early for good seats. What's early? Anything before 19:00 & you will have your seat of choice. If you come after 19:30 especially you are not guaranteed a seat! Q : What about the late show?  Depending on the turnout a late show is also available most of the time, please check the ticket page to see if there is a late show option. Basically if you can buy tickets to the late show, it's happening, if it's not an option for a ticket it's not! Both shows might be consolidated into one if there's not enough ticket sold for the late show. In this case you will recieve an e-mail telling you so. Q : Can I refund my ticket?  There are no refunds allowed because it becomes too much work for a simple Comedy Open Mic, so only buy your ticket if you know you're for sure going to be able to make it. But if for some reason you can't make it, you are welcome to use your ticket for any future Kon-Tiki Comedy Shows. Just write an e-mail to exchange. Q : Can I buy tickets at the door? No please don't. Technically we can but it complicates everything, so just buy them online. Just to persuade you NOT to ask to buy at the door: Tickets at the door are 20.-CHF. Please buy online : ) Q: Will it be funny? A : You betcha. You can't do a regular show since 2018 & not be funny. Any other questions: Email: theamericanstandupshow@gmail.com with the title Kon-Tiki Comedy But if it's any of the questions covered by the FAQ above, I will still answer it, but first I will insult you. Legal Disclaimer: Comedians may film their sets as well as the audience during the comedy show. By buying a ticket you consent to being filmed in this public space. If you ever have a problem with any clip published online you are very welcome to contact us & ask to have it removed, we are happy to accomodate you. Thank you for your understanding.

ld_json.description: Kon-Tiki Comedy! Zurich's longest standing weekly Comedy Night : English Standup at Kon-Tiki Bar since 2018 Kon-Tiki Comedy has long become a staple of Tuesday Nights in Zurich! Veterans, regulars, amateurs & newbies from all around the world show up to make people laugh. This Comedy Open Mic is regularly Hosted by Ahmet Bilge. Kon-Tiki Comedy is the place for English Standup in central Zurich. Come join & laugh with us! Frequently Asked Questions: ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Q: Is the show in English? A: YES. Kon-Tiki Comedy is always in English. Q: What's the difference of a Comedy Open Mic from a regular Comedy Show? A: Anybody who wants can go on stage at a Comedy Open Mic. A bunch of Comedians will be there, but they will be trying out jokes, because this is how Comedians find out if something is funny or not, so you get to be there at the birthplace of jokes. Often Comedy Open Mics are more casual & but also funny as well!        Q: Can I perform Comedy also?     A: Yes of course! Just contact theamericanstandupshow@gmail.com if you're interested in performing. Or directly go to the event page on facebook & write SPOT inside the event discussion. You'll be confirmed later & will get 5minutes to start off with. Anybody can sign up!        Q: What about these seats? A : First come first served rule applies! Especially since Kon-Tiki Comedy is popular, often it is packed inside, so come early for good seats. What's early? Anything before 19:00 & you will have your seat of choice. If you come after 19:30 especially you are not guaranteed a seat! Q : What about the late show?  Depending on the turnout a late show is also available most of the time, please check the ticket page to see if there is a late show option. Basically if you can buy tickets to the late show, it's happening, if it's not an option for a ticket it's not! Both shows might be consolidated into one if there's not enough ticket sold for the late show. In this case you will recieve an e-mail telling you so. Q : Can I refund my ticket?  There are no refunds allowed because it becomes too much work for a simple Comedy Open Mic, so only buy your ticket if you know you're for sure going to be able to make it. But if for some reason you can't make it, you are welcome to use your ticket for any future Kon-Tiki Comedy Shows. Just write an e-mail to exchange. Q : Can I buy tickets at the door? No please don't. Technically we can but it complicates everything, so just buy them online. Just to persuade you NOT to ask to buy at the door: Tickets at the door are 20.-CHF. Please buy online : ) Q: Will it be funny? A : You betcha. You can't do a regular show since 2018 & not be funny. Any other questions: Email: theamericanstandupshow@gmail.com with the title Kon-Tiki Comedy But if it's any of the questions covered by the FAQ above, I will still answer it, but first I will insult you. Legal Disclaimer: Comedians may film their sets as well as the audience during the comedy show. By buying a ticket you consent to being filmed in this public space. If you ever have a problem with any clip published online you are very welcome to contact us & ask to have it removed, we are happy to accomodate you. Thank you for your understanding.

events.title: Apr 16 AMBOSS JAM Donnerstag, 16. April, 21:00 Amboss Rampe, Zürich (CH)

detail.title_tag: AMBOSS JAM in Zürich | Offene Bühne Konzerte
detail.og_title: AMBOSS JAM in Zürich | Offene Bühne Konzerte
detail.text_preview: Apr 16 Donnerstag AMBOSS JAM Credits: Nicole Rötheli für Amboss Rampe Infos ansehen Do., 16. April 2026 21:00 Uhr - 23:55 Uhr Amboss Rampe, Zürich (CH) teilen Jetzt teilen Jam Session Kurzbeschrieb: Musik verbindet bekanntermassen, das zeigen die Donnerstage in der Amboss Rampe. An der wöchentlichen Jam Session dreht sich alles um das gemeinsame Musizieren. Alle, die Musik lieben sind willkommen! Beschrieb: Die Seiten sind gespannt, die Stimme geölt und das Bier kalt – Die Jam Session kann kommen! Für alle die noch nie an einer Jam-Session bei uns waren: Der Name ist Programm, nach einem 30-minütigen Intro der House-Band wird die Bühne freigegeben und es heisst: Open Mic! Rechts von der Bühne gibt es eine Warteschlange-Liste, in der man sich einschreiben kann und, danach heisst es warten, bis man an der Reihe ist und aufgerufen wird. Es ist völlig egal ob Gesang, Schlagzeug, Gitarre oder Triangel, solange die Freude am gemeinsamen Musizieren da ist, sind alle willkommen! Ab sofort gehen die Jam-Nächte ganz offiziell bis um 02.00 Uhr! Weitere Infos: Ab 21:00 Uhr | jeden Donnerstag | Amboss Rampe l Free Entry Link: https://ambossrampe.ch/rampe/#jamsession Der Event beginnt in 2 Tage 9 Std 52 Min 43 Sek Veranstalter:in Amboss Rampe Hinweis Abbrechen Hinweis Informationen Käufer:innen Die ausgewählten Tickets können nur personalisiert gekauft werden. Bitte fülle die folgenden Felder aus. Abbrechen Total: XX.XX CHF Infos grosse Karte anzeigen Ort: Amboss Rampe, Zollstrasse 80, Zürich, CH Veranstalter:in AMBOSS JAM wird organisiert durch: Amboss Rampe Kategorie: Konzerte / Offene Bühne

Es ist völlig egal ob Gesang, Schlagzeug, Gitarre oder Triangel, solange die Freude am gemeinsamen Musizieren da ist, sind alle willkommen! Ab sofort gehen die Jam-Nächte ganz offiziell bis um 02.00 Uhr! Weitere Infos:      Ab 21:00 Uhr | jeden Donnerstag | Amboss Rampe l Free Entry Link: https://ambossrampe.ch/rampe/#jamsession

detail.text_preview: Apr 25 Samstag 13th UXCamp Switzerland 2026 Credits: UXcamp.ch Tickets kaufen Sa., 25. April 2026 Türöffnung: 08:30 Uhr 09:00 Uhr - 17:00 Uhr Zürcher Hochschule der Künste ZHdK, Zürich (CH) teilen Jetzt teilen We invite you to the 13th reincarnation of UXCamp Switzerland! Join us on April 25, 2026 at the ZHdK for the 13th edition of your favorite UX Design barcamp ; a day filled with attention-grabbing, thought-provoking discussions and conversations centered around user experience design and its related disciplines. 🎉 As organizations rapidly adapt to technological advances, the role of UX faces a pivotal moment: is it still a strategic driver, or at risk of becoming redundant? «Strategic or Redundant: Has the UX Seat at the Table Disappeared?» invites critical reflection and lively debate on the evolving influence of UX. This year we challenge assumptions about UX’s value, examine how teams can maintain relevance amid shifting priorities, and explore what it takes to secure—and justify—a seat at the decision-making table in 2026 and beyond. Sponsors are invited to be part of this timely conversation, supporting thought leadership that addresses the future of UX and its impact on organizational success. Will you support our mission? 🗣️ As always, UXcamp remains an open mic unconference – a platform for fresh ideas, spontaneous talks, and passionate debates about anything that captures the attention of the UX community in Switzerland and beyond. Thanks to our ... mehr anzeigen We invite you to the 13th reincarnation of UXCamp Switzerland! Join us on April 25, 2026 at the ZHdK for the 13th edition of your favorite UX Design barcamp ; a day filled with attention-grabbing, thought-provoking discussions and conversations centered around user experience design and its related disciplines. 🎉 As organizations rapidly adapt to technological advances, the role of UX faces a pivotal moment: is it still a strategic driver, or at risk of becoming redundant? «Strategic or Redundant: Has the UX Seat at the Table Disappeared?» invites critical reflection and lively debate on the evolving influence of UX. This year we challenge assumptions about UX’s value, examine how teams can maintain relevance amid shifting priorities, and explore what it takes to secure—and justify—a seat at the decision-making table in 2026 and beyond. Sponsors are invited to be part of this timely conversation, supporting thought leadership that addresses the future of UX and its impact on organizational success. Will you support our mission? 🗣️ As always, UXcamp remains an open mic unconference – a platform for fresh ideas, spontaneous talks, and passionate debates about anything that captures the attention of the UX community in Switzerland and beyond. Thanks to our sponsors Ostschweizer Fahhochschule OST and Zeix , general entry seats are at a heavily reduced price of 8CHF * ...aber es hät so lang's hät! (get the tickets whilst you can!). If you can support us, we would love you to choose a, or multiples of, our supporter tickets. Included are: Coffee/Tea throughout the day A highly thought provoking location thanks to ZHdK Tibits Buffet for Lunch (meat free and taste full) Giveaways Reminder: The unconference schedule is created at the start of the day, not before, but you can prepare ahead of time! It’s your chance to speak to the crowd, too – so best start to think about a topic now if you haven't already got something burning to share Note: As a non-profit event run by volunteers, we are 100% reliant on sponsorship. From contributing to our social events to covering catering costs, there are many ways you can support us. We'd love to hear from you. More information on http://www.uxcamp.ch *We hope you agree that this is still a lot of value for such a small contribution. weniger anzeigen Veranstalter:in IxDA Zürich e. V. detail.text_preview: Apr 30 Donnerstag Schrödinger's Mic: English stand-up comedy Credits: SaraB Tickets kaufen Do., 30. April 2026 Türöffnung: 19:00 Uhr 20:00 Uhr - 22:00 Uhr CAB StuZ (ETH Building), Zürich (CH) teilen Jetzt teilen Are you the one who always sends memes? The loudest laugh in the group chat? The friend who says “just one drink” and somehow stays out all night? Then this comedy show is for you. Join us for Schrödinger’s Mic , a night of English stand-up comedy brought to you by ESN Zürich and ESN Winterthur . Expect a lineup of some of the best comedians on the Swiss comedy scene, delivering sharp jokes, chaotic stories, and the kind of humour that keeps you laughing long after the show is over. Whether you come with friends, a date, your flatmates, or just by yourself, this is the perfect excuse to grab a drink, relax, and enjoy a great night out. Don’t miss out – see you there, fam! We’re also excited to welcome a lineup of standout comedians from the Swiss comedy scene. The night will be hosted by headliner Richard Cunha , with performances from Matteo Hermann , Martina Hulme , Łukasz Segiet , Val Ann , and Pouya ! A few things to know before the show: The performance will be in English Doors open at 19:00 , and the show begins at 20:00 Drinks will be available before the show and during the intermission Photos will be taken during the event for promotional purposes, and possibly for someone’s Hinge profile. For more information, you can contact the ESN representative: Matteo Hermann (mherman@student.ethz.ch) Veranstalter:in ESN Zurich Infos zur Veranstalter:in Hinweis Abbrechen Hinweis Informationen Käufer:innen Die ausgewählten Tickets können nur personalisiert gekauft werden. detail.text_preview: Apr-Jun 24-16 24.04. - 16.06. Comedy Kiss Showcases Credits: Comedy Kiss Tickets Fr., 24. April 2026 - Di., 16. Juni 2026 Beginn: 20:00 Uhr Auer & Co., Zürich (CH) Part of Comedy Kiss’s mission to bring Laughter to Switzerland, these shows spotlight the best local comedic talent while supporting the growth of Zurich’s comedy scene. Whether you’re laughing at life in Switzerland ( Showcase ) or diving into the hilarities of love and dating ( Kiss & Tell ), every show is a celebration of local artistry. By attending, you’re not only enjoying top-notch entertainment but also helping to improve and sustain the vibrant local art scene. Join us for an unforgettable night of comedy, connection, and community! These shows happen every second friday and are hosted by your favorite local Brazilian comic (also the only one) Richard Cunha. ----- Tell everyone about it and buy your tickets now! Doors open at 19:00. Arrive early to Auer & Co to get a drink and save the best seats. The show is in English Photos of the show may be taken for promotional purposes. Check out our future shows as www.comedykiss.ch and follow us on Instagram at @comedykiss.ch for funny videos, show updates and more. detail.og_title: Mindful Fight (Playfight) in Oberglatt ZH | Tanzsport
detail.text_preview: Apr 19 Sonntag Mindful Fight (Playfight) Credits: me Tickets reservieren So., 19. April 2026 Türöffnung: 14:15 Uhr 14:30 Uhr - 16:30 Uhr Raum im Hof, Oberglatt (CH) teilen Jetzt teilen DE Mindful Fight (Playfight) Explanation : Mindful Fight (Playfight) ist kein Wettkampf. Es ist ein Raum für dich. Dein Körper. Dein Atem. Dein Ausdruck. Deine Verbindung. Du wählst selbst: mit wem, wie intensiv, wie lange du dich einlässt. Alles darf sein – Stille, Kraft, Lachen, Widerstand, Emotionen. Mindful Fight (Playfight) ist achtsames, spielerisches Kämpfen in Gemeinschaft und Verbindung: Wenn es für beide stimmt, begegnen sich zwei Menschen auf der Matte, folgen ihren Impulsen und versuchen, einander für drei Sekunden auf die Schulterblätter zu bringen. Es gibt kein Gewinnen oder Verlieren – nur die Möglichkeit, dich selbst besser kennenzulernen und dich zu öffnen. EN Mindful Fight (Playfight) Explanation : Mindful Fight (Playfight) is not a competition. It is a space for you. Your body. Your breath. Your expression. Your connection. You choose for yourself: with whom, how intensely, and for how long you engage. Everything is welcome—silence, strength, laughter, resistance, emotions. Mindful Fight (Playfight) is mindful, playful sparring in community and connection: when it feels right for both people, two participants meet on the mat, follow their impulses, and try to pin each other’s shoulder blades down for three seconds. There ... mehr anzeigen DE Mindful Fight (Playfight) Explanation : Mindful Fight (Playfight) ist kein Wettkampf. Es ist ein Raum für dich. Dein Körper. Dein Atem. Dein Ausdruck. Deine Verbindung. Du wählst selbst: mit wem, wie intensiv, wie lange du dich einlässt. Alles darf sein – Stille, Kraft, Lachen, Widerstand, Emotionen. Mindful Fight (Playfight) ist achtsames, spielerisches Kämpfen in Gemeinschaft und Verbindung: Wenn es für beide stimmt, begegnen sich zwei Menschen auf der Matte, folgen ihren Impulsen und versuchen, einander für drei Sekunden auf die Schulterblätter zu bringen. Es gibt kein Gewinnen oder Verlieren – nur die Möglichkeit, dich selbst besser kennenzulernen und dich zu öffnen. EN Mindful Fight (Playfight) Explanation : Mindful Fight (Playfight) is not a competition. It is a space for you. Your body. Your breath. Your expression. Your connection. You choose for yourself: with whom, how intensely, and for how long you engage. Everything is welcome—silence, strength, laughter, resistance, emotions. Mindful Fight (Playfight) is mindful, playful sparring in community and connection: when it feels right for both people, two participants meet on the mat, follow their impulses, and try to pin each other’s shoulder blades down for three seconds. There is no winning or losing—only the chance to get to know yourself better and to open up. DE Information: Für wen ist dieser Kreis gedacht? Für alle Menschen Für Neulinge ebenso wie für Erfahrene Für alle, die sich selbst besser spüren, ihre Grenzen erforschen und sich lebendiger fühlen wollen Es gibt keine körperlichen Voraussetzungen. Du entscheidest jederzeit selbst, ob, wie und mit wem du in Kontakt trittst – mit Kraft, mit Sanftheit oder einfach durch Beobachtung. Ablauf 14:15 Uhr Open Doors, Ankommen, Umziehen 14:30 Uhr Einführung (für Neulinge obligatorisch) 14:45 Uhr Start Playfight 16:15 Uhr Abschlussrunde 16:30 Uhr Raum schliessen / informeller Ausklang Mitbringen Bequeme Kleidung (lange Ärmel & Hosen empfohlen) Wasserflasche (optional, es hat Gläser) Schneiden der Nägel empfohlen; offene Wunden gut abdecken Wichtig Die Teilnahme erfolgt auf eigene Verantwortung (Versicherung ist Sache der Teilnehmenden) Du darfst jederzeit pausieren oder einfach nur zusehen Ich freue mich auf dich 🤜🏼🤛 EN Information Who is this circle for? For all people For newcomers as well as experienced practitioners For everyone who wants to feel themselves better, explore their boundaries, and feel more alive There are no physical prerequisites. You decide at any time whether, how, and with whom you make contact—with strength, with gentleness, or simply by observing. Schedule 14:15 Doors open, arrival, changing 14:30 Introduction (mandatory for newcomers) 14:45 Playfight begins 16:15 Closing round 16:30 Space closes / informal wind‑down What to bring Comfortable clothing (long sleeves and pants recommended) Water bottle (optional, glasses are available) Trimmed nails recommended; cover open wounds well Important Participation is at your own responsibility (insurance is the participants’ responsibility) You may pause at any time or simply watch I look forward to seeing you 🤜🏼🤛 Vale weniger anzeigen Der Event beginnt in 5 Tage 3 Std 22 Min 06 Sek Veranstalter:in Ankura Infos zur Veranstalter:in Hinweis Abbrechen Hinweis Informationen Käufer:innen Die ausgewählten Tickets können nur personalisiert gekauft werden. There is no winning or losing--only the chance to get to know yourself better and to open up.   DE Information:  Für wen ist dieser Kreis gedacht? ld_json.name: Mindful Fight (Playfight)
ld_json.description: DE Mindful Fight (Playfight) Explanation: Mindful Fight (Playfight) ist kein Wettkampf.     Es ist ein Raum für dich.     Dein Körper. Dein Atem. Dein Ausdruck. Deine Verbindung.        Du wählst selbst: mit wem, wie intensiv, wie lange du dich einlässt.     Alles darf sein - Stille, Kraft, Lachen, Widerstand, Emotionen.        Mindful Fight (Playfight) ist achtsames, spielerisches Kämpfen in Gemeinschaft und Verbindung: Wenn es für beide stimmt, begegnen sich zwei Menschen auf der Matte, folgen ihren Impulsen und versuchen, einander für drei Sekunden auf die Schulterblätter zu bringen.     Es gibt kein Gewinnen oder Verlieren - nur die Möglichkeit, dich selbst besser kennenzulernen und dich zu öffnen.   EN Mindful Fight (Playfight) Explanation: Mindful Fight (Playfight) is not a competition.     It is a space for you.     Your body. Your breath. Your expression. Your connection. You choose for yourself: with whom, how intensely, and for how long you engage.     Everything is welcome--silence, strength, laughter, resistance, emotions. Mindful Fight (Playfight) is mindful, playful sparring in community and connection: when it feels right for both people, two participants meet on the mat, follow their impulses, and try to pin each other's shoulder blades down for three seconds.     There is no winning or losing--only the chance to get to know yourself better and to open up.   DE Information:  Für wen ist dieser Kreis gedacht? Für alle Menschen Für Neulinge ebenso wie für Erfahrene Für alle, die sich selbst besser spüren, ihre Grenzen erforschen und sich lebendiger fühlen wollen Es gibt keine körperlichen Voraussetzungen. Du entscheidest jederzeit selbst, ob, wie und mit wem du in Kontakt trittst - mit Kraft, mit Sanftheit oder einfach durch Beobachtung. Ablauf 18:45 Uhr Open Doors, Ankommen, Umziehen     19:00 Uhr Einführung (für Neulinge obligatorisch)     19:15 Uhr Start Playfight     20:45 Uhr Abschlussrunde     21:00 Uhr Raum schliessen / informeller Ausklang Mitbringen Bequeme Kleidung (lange Ärmel & Hosen empfohlen) Wasserflasche (optional, es hat Gläser) Schneiden der Nägel empfohlen; offene Wunden gut abdecken Wichtig Die Teilnahme erfolgt auf eigene Verantwortung (Versicherung ist Sache der Teilnehmenden) Du darfst jederzeit pausieren oder einfach nur zusehen Ich freue mich auf dich 🤜🏼🤛   EN Information Who is this circle for? For all people     For newcomers as well as experienced practitioners     For everyone who wants to feel themselves better, explore their boundaries, and feel more alive There are no physical prerequisites. You decide at any time whether, how, and with whom you make contact--with strength, with gentleness, or simply by observing. Schedule 18:45 Doors open, arrival, changing     19:00 Introduction (mandatory for newcomers)     19:15 Playfight begins     20:45 Closing round     21:00 Space closes / informal wind-down What to bring Comfortable clothing (long sleeves and pants recommended)     Water bottle (optional, glasses are available)     Trimmed nails recommended; cover open wounds well Important Participation is at your own responsibility (insurance is the participants' responsibility)     You may pause at any time or simply watch I look forward to seeing you 🤜🏼🤛     Vale

Es gibt kein Gewinnen oder Verlieren – nur die Möglichkeit, dich selbst besser kennenzulernen und dich zu öffnen. EN Mindful Fight (Playfight) Explanation : Mindful Fight (Playfight) is not a competition. It is a space for you. Your body. Your breath. Your expression. Your connection. You choose for yourself: with whom, how intensely, and for how long you engage. Everything is welcome—silence, strength, laughter, resistance, emotions. Mindful Fight (Playfight) is mindful, playful sparring in community and connection: when it feels right for both people, two participants meet on the mat, follow their impulses, and try to pin each other’s shoulder blades down for three seconds. There is no winning or losing—only the chance to get to know yourself better and to open up. DE Information: Für wen ist dieser Kreis gedacht? Für alle Menschen Für Neulinge ebenso wie für Erfahrene Für alle, die sich selbst besser spüren, ihre Grenzen erforschen und sich lebendiger fühlen wollen Es gibt keine körperlichen Voraussetzungen. Du entscheidest jederzeit selbst, ob, wie und mit wem du in Kontakt trittst – mit Kraft, mit Sanftheit oder einfach durch Beobachtung. For all people For newcomers as well as experienced practitioners For everyone who wants to feel themselves better, explore their boundaries, and feel more alive There are no physical prerequisites. You decide at any time whether, how, and with whom you make contact—with strength, with gentleness, or simply by observing. detail.title_tag: The Big Comedy Kiss with Finlay Christie in Zürich | Comedy & Kabarett
detail.og_title: The Big Comedy Kiss with Finlay Christie in Zürich | Comedy & Kabarett
detail.text_preview: Apr 18 Samstag The Big Comedy Kiss with Finlay Christie Credits: Shane Norton Tickets kaufen Sa., 18. April 2026 Türöffnung: 18:30 Uhr 19:30 Uhr - 21:30 Uhr SOHO, Zürich (CH) teilen Jetzt teilen The Biggest Comedy Kiss keeps getting Bigger and Better! Our much-loved comedy night is back — and this time, we’re turning up the spotlight! We’ve gone all out to make this our most exciting edition yet, featuring one incredible international star alongside some of the finest local comedians in Switzerland. Finlay Christie - Finlay is young but he's been on the circuit now for what feels forever. At 19, he was the youngest ever winner of the prestigious "So You Think You’re Funny" competition, and then developed into a YouTube sensation with over 450k subscribers and 200m views. He's been a comedian that I've been keen to get over into Switzerland for ages, so it's a pleasure to finally be able to do so. He has appeared on 8 out of 10 Cats Does Countdown (Channel 4), The Stand-Up Sketch Show (ITV2), Comedy Central Live, Person on a Chair (Channel 4), The BBC New Comedy Awards, Get Off My Phone! (Dave) and Jokes Only An AI Can Tell (Channel 4). He has performed at Montreal’s Just For Laughs festival and across Europe for the Comedy Store. "Delivering a hugely impressive debut that could legitimately see him labelled as the voice of his generation" ★★★★ Chortle "Finlay Christie’s OK Zoomer is a show you need to see at the Fringe this year… will leave you ... mehr anzeigen The Biggest Comedy Kiss keeps getting Bigger and Better! Finlay Christie - Finlay is young but he's been on the circuit now for what feels forever.
