He has appeared on 8 out of 10 Cats Does Countdown (Channel 4), The Stand-Up Sketch Show (ITV2), Comedy Central Live, Person on a Chair (Channel 4), The BBC New Comedy Awards, Get Off My Phone! (Dave) and Jokes Only An AI Can Tell (Channel 4). He has performed at Montreal’s Just For Laughs festival and across Europe for the Comedy Store. "Delivering a hugely impressive debut that could legitimately see him labelled as the voice of his generation" ★★★★ Chortle "Finlay Christie’s OK Zoomer is a show you need to see at the Fringe this year… will leave you in stitches" ★★★★ Entertainment Now "Outstanding… he will be taking the comedy world by storm, catch him now while you can" ★★★★ One4Review "Finlay Christie will be the future of stand-up comedy" ★★★★ Broadway Baby ----- Teddy Hall - Since learning his trade as a comedian in London, Teddy has been performing across Europe for half a decade, exciting audiences with an unpredictable and quick-witted brand of comedy all about language, mental health, sexuality, and dentists. Headlining shows across Europe and featuring on television in Switzerland, Germany, Austria, and Romania, Teddy's comedy veers from the profound to the inane to the stupid, keeping audiences on their toes, despite this being a very uncomfortable way to sit. ----- Łukasz Segiet - There are many planets in the universe and Łukasz lives on one of them. He likes jokes, comedy, space, travel, and jokes. Łukasz knows how microphones work and how to use a mic stand. Which is a useful skill in the business of comedy. His offbeat and unique style will certainly make you laugh. I know this because I can't keep a smile off my face when he's on stage. Spread the word and check out our future shows at www.comedykiss.ch and follow us on Instagram at @comedykiss.ch. ----- FAQ and More Info: Q: What time should I arrive? A: Doors open at 18:30. Arrive early to grab a drink, order some food, and secure the best seats. Email info@soho-zurich.ch to reserve your table. Q: What language is the show? A: The show is in English. Q: What kind of comedy will I see? Will it be offensive? A: We can't guarantee you won't be offended since this is very relative. In the show description, you’ll find links to help you decide if that comedian is right for you. Ultimately, our goal is to bring good times and laughter to Switzerland and not to hurt feelings. Q: Can I buy tickets at the door? A: Yes! Via Twint, but only if there are no shows or tickets are still available Note: Photos of the show will be taken for promotional purposes. weniger anzeigen Der Event beginnt in 4 Tage 8 Std 21 Min 45 Sek Veranstalter:in Shane Norton Infos zur Veranstalter:in Hinweis Abbrechen Hinweis Informationen Käufer:innen Die ausgewählten Tickets können nur personalisiert gekauft werden. detail.og_title: Open Studio Gathering in Zürich | Gesundheit & Wohlbefinden
detail.text_preview: Mai 3 Sonntag Open Studio Gathering Credits: Studio Kayana Tickets kaufen So., 3. Mai 2026 Türöffnung: 09:50 Uhr 10:00 Uhr - 16:00 Uhr Studio Kayana, Zürich (CH) teilen Jetzt teilen Open Studio Gathering - Studio Kayana Step into Studio Kayana for a day of connection, movement and nourishment. Whether you’re here for the full experience or just dropping in to soak up the atmosphere - you’re warmly welcome. The Morning Start your day with a grounding Sound Bath with Anja from 10:00-10:45am, followed by a Movement Session with Irem from 11:00-11:45am to get your body flowing. These sessions are limited in space and need to be booked separately - so grab your spot early. The Afternoon From 12:00pm on you can stick around for a relaxed and joyful community gathering. Enjoy a fresh, gut-friendly brunch curated by Alina, enjoy the tunes of live DJane Tina Marie and treat yourself to an Astrology Mini Reading with Alley - because who doesn’t want a little cosmic clarity? Free entry for the open gathering from 12pm on - secure your ticket so we can plan better. Morning sessions require separate booking due to limited capacity. ____________________ Soundbath with Anja from Ahimsa Space ANJA GUIDES YOU INTO STILLNESS THROUGH AN IMMERSIVE SOUND BATH - A SPACE TO ARRIVE, TO BREATHE AND TRAVEL INWARDS. SOUNDS AND FREQUENCIES WASH OVER YOU, GENTLY GROUNDING THE BODY AND QUIETING THE MIND, AS YOU SIMPLY ... mehr anzeigen Open Studio Gathering - Studio Kayana Step into Studio Kayana for a day of connection, movement and nourishment. Whether you’re here for the full experience or just dropping in to soak up the atmosphere - you’re warmly welcome. The Morning Start your day with a grounding Sound Bath with Anja from 10:00-10:45am, followed by a Movement Session with Irem from 11:00-11:45am to get your body flowing. These sessions are limited in space and need to be booked separately - so grab your spot early. The Afternoon From 12:00pm on you can stick around for a relaxed and joyful community gathering. Enjoy a fresh, gut-friendly brunch curated by Alina, enjoy the tunes of live DJane Tina Marie and treat yourself to an Astrology Mini Reading with Alley - because who doesn’t want a little cosmic clarity? Free entry for the open gathering from 12pm on - secure your ticket so we can plan better. Morning sessions require separate booking due to limited capacity. ____________________ Soundbath with Anja from Ahimsa Space ANJA GUIDES YOU INTO STILLNESS THROUGH AN IMMERSIVE SOUND BATH - A SPACE TO ARRIVE, TO BREATHE AND TRAVEL INWARDS. SOUNDS AND FREQUENCIES WASH OVER YOU, GENTLY GROUNDING THE BODY AND QUIETING THE MIND, AS YOU SIMPLY ALLOW THE VIBRATIONS TO MOVE THROUGH YOU. A SOFT AND NOURISHING BEGINNING TO THE DAY. Movement with Irem A MOVEMENT SESSION TO DEEPLY ARRIVE IN YOUR BODY. THROUGH SOMATIC EXERCISES INSPIRED BY YOGA, PILATES AND QIGONG, WE EXPLORE BREATH, GROUNDING AND FLUID MOVEMENT TO AWAKEN ENERGY AND PRESENCE. THE PERFECT WAY TO SET THE TONE FOR THE DAY - DROPPING INTO YOUR BODY AND ARRIVING FULLY IN THE SPACE AND THE COMMUNITY AROUND YOU. Music by Tina-Marie TINA MARIE IS A ZURICH-BASED DJ AND MULTIDISCIPLINARY CREATIVE WHOSE SETS FLOW EFFORTLESSLY THROUGH OLD SCHOOL HIP HOP, SOUL & JAZZ, AFRO-FUNK, DISCO AND EVERYTHING IN BETWEEN - ALWAYS COLORFUL, ALWAYS SURPRISING. DEEPLY INSPIRED BY HER AFRICAN ROOTS, SHE WEAVES HER HERITAGE THROUGHOUT HER ECLECTIC SELECTIONS, INVITING LISTENERS ON A JOURNEY THROUGH SOUND AND TIME - WHERE MUSIC BECOMES A SPACE FOR CONNECTION AND SELF-DISCOVERY. Brunch by Alina - Gut Connection EVERY DISH IS PREPARED BY ALINA HERSELF. FROM THE MINDFUL SELECTION OF HIGH QUALITY INGREDIENTS TO THE LOVING, HANDMADE PREPARATION OF EACH ELEMENT, WHERE THOUGHTFUL DETAILS BECOME PART OF THE CULINARY EXPERIENCE. THE BRUNCH FOCUSES ON MINIMALLY PROCESSED FOODS WITH SHORT, TRANSPARENT INGREDIENT LISTS. EACH DISH IS DESIGNED TO BE MICROBIOME SUPPORTIVE, ANTI -INFLAMMATORY, AND EASY TO DIGEST.. ALL CREATIONS ARE GLUTEN-FREE, REFINED SUGAR-FREE, AND MADE FROM NATURAL INGREDIENTS WITHOUT ADDITIVES. Astrology Mini-Readings with Alley ALLEY OFFERS INTIMATE MINI ASTROLOGY READINGS THROUGHOUT THE DAY - A MOMENT TO PAUSE, TUNE INWARD, AND GAIN A LITTLE COSMIC PERSPECTIVE. WHETHER YOU’RE CURIOUS OR A SEASONED STARGAZER, HER READINGS OFFER A GENTLE AND PERSONAL GLIMPSE INTO YOUR CHART AND WHAT THE STARS MIGHT HAVE TO SAY RIGHT NOW.​​ weniger anzeigen Veranstalter:in Studio Kayana Infos zur Veranstalter:in Hinweis Abbrechen Hinweis Informationen Käufer:innen Die ausgewählten Tickets können nur personalisiert gekauft werden. detail.text_preview: Okt 10 Samstag The Big Comedy Kiss with Anuvab Pal Credits: Shane Norton Tickets kaufen Sa., 10. Oktober 2026 Türöffnung: 18:30 Uhr 19:30 Uhr - 21:30 Uhr SOHO, Zürich (CH) teilen Jetzt teilen Our much-loved comedy night is back — and this time, we’re turning up the spotlight! We’ve gone all out to make this our most exciting edition yet, featuring one incredible international star alongside some of the finest local comedians in Switzerland. Anuvab Pal – Described by The New York Times as “India’s most intelligent comedian” and by the BBC as “India’s answer to British wit,” Anuvab Pal is one of the most globally recognised English-speaking comics to come out of India. His stand-up special The Nation Wants To Know has played over 500 sold-out shows from Mumbai to Sydney to San Francisco, while his hit show Empire — a comedy about the history of the British Empire in India — has toured internationally across 12 cities and is now available as a special on Amazon Prime UK as part of Soho Theatre Live. Beyond stand-up, Anuvab is a prolific writer and creator. He has written Bollywood films Loins of Punjab Presents and The President Is Coming , the latter developed by London’s Royal Court Theatre . His play Chaos Theory became a bestselling novel, and he has created multiple sitcoms for Amazon Prime Video India. His work has been featured internationally in Time Magazine, CNN, BBC, The Wall Street Journal, The Economist, Financial Times and The New Yorker , among many ... mehr anzeigen Our much-loved comedy night is back — and this time, we’re turning up the spotlight! We’ve gone all out to make this our most exciting edition yet, featuring one incredible international star alongside some of the finest local comedians in Switzerland. Anuvab Pal – Described by The New York Times as “India’s most intelligent comedian” and by the BBC as “India’s answer to British wit,” Anuvab Pal is one of the most globally recognised English-speaking comics to come out of India. His stand-up special The Nation Wants To Know has played over 500 sold-out shows from Mumbai to Sydney to San Francisco, while his hit show Empire — a comedy about the history of the British Empire in India — has toured internationally across 12 cities and is now available as a special on Amazon Prime UK as part of Soho Theatre Live. Beyond stand-up, Anuvab is a prolific writer and creator. He has written Bollywood films Loins of Punjab Presents and The President Is Coming , the latter developed by London’s Royal Court Theatre . His play Chaos Theory became a bestselling novel, and he has created multiple sitcoms for Amazon Prime Video India. His work has been featured internationally in Time Magazine, CNN, BBC, The Wall Street Journal, The Economist, Financial Times and The New Yorker , among many others. On screen and radio, his credits include QI (BBC2), Big Asian Stand-Up (BBC2), The News Quiz (BBC Radio 4), The New Year’s Eve International Show (BBC World Service) and Al Murray: Why Does Everyone Hate The British Empire (Sky History). He is also a regular contributor to the global satirical podcast The Bugle and writes a monthly column for The Economic Times . “India’s most intelligent comedian” — The New York Times “India’s answer to British wit” — BBC “Spectacular” ★★★★ — India Today “Brilliant” ★★★★ — Time Out Mumbai “One of India’s funniest people” — CNN “Very clever, very funny” — The Guardian ----- Chris Darwa is one of our local heavyweights. He's keen and commited to making you all laugh in English, and he's good at doing it. His current tour is selling well after his previous successful european tours in 2024 and 2023. Known for punch heavy anecdotes, high energy, playful crowd work and brutal honesty, Chris's shows are always a unique experience and not to be missed! ----- Bianca Lala - Bianca Lala, a Prague-based stand-up comedian, producer, and writer, transforms life’s absurdities into painfully relatable jokes. A semi-finalist in Prague’s Funniest competition 2025 and featured on Red Mic, she produces weekly stand-up shows tackling everything from dating and sex to dark humor rooted in life’s tragedies. Having performed in various sketchy venues across Europe—and surviving—Bianca recently appeared on national television in her native Romania (the sketchiest of all). As the co-founder of Unhinged Theatre, she also works behind the scenes, writing scripts and crafting chaotic yet entertaining plotlines. Spread the word and check out our future shows at www.comedykiss.ch and follow us on Instagram at @comedykiss.ch. ----- FAQ and More Info: Q: What time should I arrive? A: Doors open at 18:30. Arrive early to grab a drink, order some food, and secure the best seats. Q: What language is the show? A: The show is in English. Q: What kind of comedy will I see? Will it be offensive? A: We can't guarantee you won't be offended since this is very relative. In the show description, you’ll find links to help you decide if that comedian is right for you. Ultimately, our goal is to bring good times and laughter to Switzerland and not to hurt feelings. Q: Can I buy tickets at the door? A: Yes! Via Twint, but only if there are no shows or tickets are still available Note: Photos of the show will be taken for promotional purposes. weniger anzeigen Veranstalter:in Shane Norton Infos zur Veranstalter:in Hinweis Abbrechen Hinweis Informationen Käufer:innen Die ausgewählten Tickets können nur personalisiert gekauft werden. detail.text_preview: Apr-Jun 14-23 14.04. - 23.06. Down Under Comedy Credits: Chris Darwa Tickets Di., 14. April 2026 - Di., 23. Juni 2026 Beginn: 19:30 Uhr ROBIN's Coffee, Zürich (CH) NOW EVERY SECOND TUESDAY at ROBIN's Coffee : It's DOWN UNDER COMEDY ! Chris Darwa brings his brand of unstoppable Australian comedy to the stage, along with a mix of hilarious friends from the Swiss Comedy scene, some experimenting with new material, others honing their act, either way, your Tuesday is sure to end pissing yourself with laughs. Doors - 19:15 / Show Start - 19:30 Get there early to enjoy! Venue open till 24:00 Find out about Chris Darwa on instagram @chrisdarwa Frequently Asked Questions Is the show really in English? Absolutely. Every set is performed in English by a mix of Swiss-based and international comics, so no Swiss-German skills required. Will it be funny? Most of the time, yes! A show like this is a roller-coaster: seasoned acts, new voices, and the occasional glorious train-wreck. It’s all part of the charm. Can I perform too? If you're really looking to try - find out more about how to do it here: https://inyourfacecomedy.ch/perform/ . Do I need to buy tickets in advance? Please do. We’re usually running around before the show and door sales slow things down. If you’re stuck, we’ll try, but no promises. How does seating work? First come, first ... mehr anzeigen NOW EVERY SECOND TUESDAY at ROBIN's Coffee : It's DOWN UNDER COMEDY ! Absolutely. Every set is performed in English by a mix of Swiss-based and international comics, so no Swiss-German skills required. Will it be funny? Most of the time, yes! A show like this is a roller-coaster: seasoned acts, new voices, and the occasional glorious train-wreck. It’s all part of the charm. Can I perform too? If you're really looking to try - find out more about how to do it here: https://inyourfacecomedy.ch/perform/ . Do I need to buy tickets in advance? Please do. We’re usually running around before the show and door sales slow things down. If you’re stuck, we’ll try, but no promises. How does seating work? First come, first served—so grab a drink, snag a seat, and settle in. Is food available at the bar? ROBIN’s serves drinks only. For a pre-show bite, try Restaurant Johanniter (classic Swiss) or Holy Cow! across the street for burgers. Will the comedians pick on me? We chat with the crowd for laughs, not humiliation. Friendly banter only - you’re safe. How long is the show? Doors open 7:15pm, show starts ~7:30pm with a 15 min break in the middle ending around 9:15pm. Enough time for the last trams home ;) Age limit? All ages welcome of course 16+ recommended (adult themes, spicy language). Legal Disclaimer Please be aware that comedians may record their performances during the show, and audience members may also appear in these recordings. By purchasing a ticket and attending the event, you consent to being filmed or photographed in this public setting. If any content featuring you is later published online and you are uncomfortable with it, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us. We’re happy to review the material and will gladly remove it upon request. Thank you for your understanding and support! weniger anzeigen Name Datum / Zeit Ort Down Under Comedy Dienstag, 14.04.2026, 19:30 Uhr ROBIN's Coffee, 8001 Zürich, CH Tickets Down Under Comedy Dienstag, 28.04.2026, 19:30 Uhr ROBIN's Coffee, 8001 Zürich, CH Tickets Down Under Comedy Dienstag, 12.05.2026, 19:30 Uhr ROBIN's Coffee, 8001 Zürich, CH Tickets Down Under Comedy Dienstag, 26.05.2026, 19:30 Uhr ROBIN's Coffee, 8001 Zürich, CH Tickets Down Under Comedy Dienstag, 09.06.2026, 19:30 Uhr ROBIN's Coffee, 8001 Zürich, CH Tickets Down Under Comedy Dienstag, 23.06.2026, 19:30 Uhr ROBIN's Coffee, 8001 Zürich, CH Tickets Ticket-Status: Wenige Tickets verfügbar Keine Tickets verfügbar Verkaufsstart später

detail.text_preview: zur Übersicht von BEYOND THE MAT - TEACHER CIRCLES Apr 24 Freitag BEYOND THE MAT - TEACHER CIRCLES Credits: Miriam Seo Tickets kaufen Fr., 24. April 2026 17:00 Uhr - 19:00 Uhr Soul City, Zürich (CH) teilen Jetzt teilen BEYOND THE MAT: TEACHER CIRCLES Pflege deine Praxis. Teile deine Weisheit. Vernetze dich mit anderen Facilitators. Als Facilitators schenken wir so viel Energie unseren Schüler*innen, dass wir oft vergessen, uns selbst und unser eigenes Wachstum zu nähren. BEYOND THE MAT: TEACHER CIRCLES bieten dir einen geschützten Raum, um mit Gleichgesinnten zusammenzukommen, Erfahrungen zu teilen und dich gegenseitig auf deinem beruflichen und persönlichen Weg zu unterstützen. Wir haben diese Teacher Circles im Januar 2025 ins Leben gerufen, mit der Intention, mehr Gemeinschaft zu schaffen. Denn die Berufung als Facilitator kann sich manchmal einsam anfühlen, wie ein Weg, den man alleine gehen muss. Oft ist es gar nicht so einfach, unterstützende, mitfühlende Menschen zu finden, die wirklich verstehen, was dieser Weg bedeutet. Genau deshalb wollten wir einen Raum eröffnen, in dem wir uns gegenseitig sehen, verstehen und stärken können: ein Ort, an dem Freundschaften entstehen, Zusammenarbeit möglich wird und das einfache, aber kraftvolle Gefühl wächst: Ich sehe dich. Ich verstehe dich. Ich habe das auch erlebt. Monat für Monat widmen wir uns einem neuen Thema – bisher z. B.: Die Beziehung zwischen Facilitator und Facilitated Selbstbestimmung und Wertschätzung Der Umgang Geld ... mehr anzeigen BEYOND THE MAT: TEACHER CIRCLES Pflege deine Praxis. Teile deine Weisheit. Vernetze dich mit anderen Facilitators. Als Facilitators schenken wir so viel Energie unseren Schüler*innen, dass wir oft vergessen, uns selbst und unser eigenes Wachstum zu nähren. BEYOND THE MAT: TEACHER CIRCLES bieten dir einen geschützten Raum, um mit Gleichgesinnten zusammenzukommen, Erfahrungen zu teilen und dich gegenseitig auf deinem beruflichen und persönlichen Weg zu unterstützen. Wir haben diese Teacher Circles im Januar 2025 ins Leben gerufen, mit der Intention, mehr Gemeinschaft zu schaffen. Denn die Berufung als Facilitator kann sich manchmal einsam anfühlen, wie ein Weg, den man alleine gehen muss. Oft ist es gar nicht so einfach, unterstützende, mitfühlende Menschen zu finden, die wirklich verstehen, was dieser Weg bedeutet. Genau deshalb wollten wir einen Raum eröffnen, in dem wir uns gegenseitig sehen, verstehen und stärken können: ein Ort, an dem Freundschaften entstehen, Zusammenarbeit möglich wird und das einfache, aber kraftvolle Gefühl wächst: Ich sehe dich. Ich verstehe dich. Ich habe das auch erlebt. Monat für Monat widmen wir uns einem neuen Thema – bisher z. B.: Die Beziehung zwischen Facilitator und Facilitated Selbstbestimmung und Wertschätzung Der Umgang Geld in Heilberufen Digitale Tools für Lehrende Thema April: Schwellen und Abschlüsse — Die Kunst des Loslassen Dieser Kreis eröffnet einen Raum für die Trauer, die Klarheit und den Mut, die damit verbunden sind, etwas zu beenden, das sich nicht mehr stimmig anfühlt. Wie erkennen wir, wann etwas vollständig ist?Wann bleiben wir, wann verändern wir etwas und wann treten wir ganz zurück? Ein Gespräch darüber, wie wir wahrnehmen, dass ein Projekt, eine Zusammenarbeit oder eine Rolle ihr natürliches Ende erreicht hat … und was es braucht, diesen Moment zu würdigen. Was dich erwartet Offener Austausch: Teile deine Erfahrungen, lausche den Geschichten anderer und lass dich inspirieren. Community-Support: Ein unterstützender Raum – on- und offline –, in dem wir voneinander lernen und einander stärken. Snacks und Tee: Eine entspannte Atmosphäre, um dich wohlzufühlen und authentisch zu sein. Details Wann: 1× pro Monat, freitags von 17:00–19:00 Wo: Soul City Zürich, Dienerstr. 10 Wer: Offen für Yogalehrer innen, Meditationsleiter innen, Achtsamkeitscoaches, Massagetherapeut*innen, Breathwork-Facilitators und andere Lehrende im Bereich Wohlbefinden und Selbstständigkeit. Wir führen zudem eine WhatsApp-Gruppe , in der wir uns zwischen den Treffen weiter austauschen, unsere Angebote teilen und neue Projekte entstehen lassen. Komm vorbei, teile deine Reise und lass uns gemeinsam neue Wege entdecken. I ch (Miriam Seo, @aumiriyoga) freue mich darauf, diesen Raum mit euch zu halten. Hinweis: Sprache: Deutsch. Für English speakers bitte im Vorhinein Bescheid geben. ENG BEYOND THE MAT: TEACHER CIRCLES Nurture your practice. Share your wisdom. Connect with other facilitators. As facilitators, we give so much energy to our students that we often forget to nourish ourselves and our own growth. BEYOND THE MAT: TEACHER CIRCLES offer you a safe space to come together with like-minded people, share experiences, and support each other on your professional and personal journey. We started these Teacher Circles in January 2025 with the intention of creating more community. Because the calling of being a facilitator can sometimes feel lonely, like a path you have to walk alone. It is not always easy to find supportive, compassionate people who truly understand what this path means. That is exactly why we wanted to open a space where we can see, understand, and empower one another: a place where friendships can form, collaborations can emerge, and the simple but powerful feeling can grow: I see you. I understand you. I have experienced this too. Month by month we dedicate ourselves to a new topic – so far, for example: The relationship between facilitator and facilitated Self-determination and appreciation Working with money in healing professions Digital tools for teachers Topic in April Thresholds and Endings — The Art of Knowing When to Let Go This circle opens space for the grief, clarity, and courage involved in ending what no longer feels aligned. How do we discern when something is complete? When to stay, when to shift, and when to step away entirely? A conversation about recognizing when a project, collaboration, or role has reached its natural end... and what it takes to honor that. What to expect Open exchange: Share your experiences, listen to the stories of others, and allow yourself to be inspired. Community support: A supportive space – online and offline – where we learn from each other and strengthen one another. Snacks and tea: A relaxed atmosphere where you can feel comfortable and show up authentically. Details When: Once a month, Fridays from 17:00–19:00 Where: Soul City Zürich, Dienerstr. 10 Who: Open to yoga teachers, meditation guides, mindfulness coaches, massage therapists, breathwork facilitators, and other teachers in the fields of wellbeing and self-employment. We also host a WhatsApp group , where we continue exchanging between meetings, share our offerings, and let new projects emerge. Come by, share your journey, and let’s discover new paths together. I (Miriam Seo, @aumiriyoga) look forward to holding this space with you. Note: Language: German. English speakers please let us know in advance. ✨ weniger anzeigen Veranstalter:in Miriam Seo Infos zur Veranstalter:in Hinweis Abbrechen Hinweis Informationen Käufer:innen Die ausgewählten Tickets können nur personalisiert gekauft werden. We also host a WhatsApp group, where we continue exchanging between meetings, share our offerings, and let new projects emerge. Come by, share your journey, and let's discover new paths together. I (Miriam Seo, @aumiriyoga) look forward to holding this space with you. Note: Language: German. English speakers please let us know in advance. ✨

Summer Special: Mai, Juni, August Ort GZ Wollishofen Bachstrasse 7 Saal 60 Veranstalter*in Open Mic Team Bianca, David, Peter und Alex – meldet euch bei Fragen via Facebook oder Instagram und GZ Wollishofen Sandra Hauser E-Mail 043 243 11 36 (keine Auskunft über Equipment etc) Kosten kostenlos Anmeldung Ohne Anmeldung Besondere Hinweise An der Bar bekommt ihr leckere Getränke und kleine Snacks zu einem guten Preis! Im Sommer findet der Event draussen in Form von einem Summer Special statt: hier findest du die Infos und Daten . Der Anlass für alle, die gerne Musik machen oder hören und die Woche am Freitagabend ausklingen lassen möchten. Ob Profi oder Anfänger*in, ob alleine oder mit anderen Musiker*innen; alle Genres, Niveaus und akustischen Kunstformen sind am Mikrofon willkommen! Nutze die Gelegenheit, deinen Sound zu teilen, Kontakte zu knüpfen und mit anderen zu jammen. Komm vorbei und geniesse einen vielfältigen Abend im GZ am See. Instagram: @openmicwolli
